name: Trading Floor
narrativeHook: The trading floor is a wall of noise — screens flashing, phones ringing, traders shouting. Billions of pounds flow through this room every day. But buried in the transaction pipeline is a parasite: a three-stage process skimming fractions of a penny from every trade.
storyArc: The agent enters Act II and the Leviathan conspiracy thread. The trading floor processes 2.4 billion pounds in monthly transactions through a three-stage pipeline. Stage 1: legitimate trade execution. Stage 2: reconciliation through module_v7 (hosted on floor 14's server). Stage 3: settlement — but between stages 2 and 3, a 0.003% skim diverts funds to Apex Consulting account CY-8847-331 in Cyprus. That's approximately 72,000 pounds per day. The reconciliation_module_v7 source code is on floor 14 but the agent can trace its effects here. Sofia Marchetti processes the Apex account transfers unknowingly.

characters.role: Player — analysing trading data and transaction flows
David Osei (CFO) oversees the trading floor. Increasingly nervous. Avoids questions about reconciliation.
Sofia Marchetti processes Apex account transfers. Does not understand the full picture.

objectives.description: Identify the three-stage transaction pipeline and the point where the skim occurs — between reconciliation (stage 2) and settlement (stage 3).
Calculate the skim parameters: 2.4B monthly volume, 0.003% skim rate = approximately 72,000 pounds per day diverted to account CY-8847-331.
Trace the skim to reconciliation_module_v7 running on floor 14's server — the source code that implements the diversion.

elevatorKey.description: The transaction analysis reveals the server address on floor 12 where the reconciliation module runs.
